planted.desc: README says the default port is 3000, but src/server.js sets DEFAULT_PORT = 8080
README says start() returns a Promise, but the code returns the port number synchronously
README documents connect(url), but no such function is exported by src/server.js

decoys.why: an explicitly aspirational Roadmap item — intentionally absent from code, not drift
accurate claim — src/server.js does export DEFAULT_PORT; not drift
